header.persuadeTooltip: Persuade Lv.{{level}} (can persuade monsters with ≤{{level}} HP layers) / cost {{cost}}g{{discount}}

goal.objectiveBody1: You are an adventurer delving into the dungeon. The deck contains
goal.objectiveBody2: (monsters, weapons, shields, potions, spells, amulets, events). You must process every card and defeat all monsters before
goal.loopStep2Post: (attack monsters, equip weapons/shields, take potions, etc.).
goal.loopStep3Post: remains, the waterfall triggers — that card is auto-discarded, preview cards drop onto the board, and new previews are drawn from the deck.
goal.loopStep4: Repeat until the deck is empty.
goal.layoutTopBarDesc: ❤️ HP, 🪙 Gold, 📦 Deck count, 🌊 Waterfall count, 🏪 Shop level
goal.layoutRow2Desc: Active area (5 active cards) + 💀 Graveyard (discard pile)
goal.layoutRow3Desc: Amulet slots (cap 2) → Equipment slots ×2 → Hero → Backpack → Class deck
goal.recycleBagBodyA2: does not go to the graveyard after use; it enters the
goal.recycleBagBodyA3: . Each waterfall, cards in the bag tick down, and after a few turns they return to your backpack to be reused. You can also drag amulets and permanent equipment into the bag to recycle them. The Recycle Bag is the core engine of the game.
goal.classDeckIntroPost: (21 cards). You can obtain class cards by:
goal.classDeckListItem2Pre: Monster loot has a chance to grant a
goal.classDeckListItem3: Class cards can be purchased in shops

monster.title: Monster
monster.desc: Has HP layers and attack. Strip all layers with weapons to kill, otherwise the monster retaliates. Elites have special abilities, and the final foe transforms into a Boss.

weapon.title: Weapon
weapon.desc: Equip in the left/right slot; has durability. Drag onto a monster to attack. Each slot can attack only once per turn.

shield.title: Shield
shield.desc: Equip in a slot to block monster damage. Each block consumes 1 durability.

potion.title: Potion
potion.desc: One-shot consumables — heal, repair, draw from backpack, etc. Can be stashed in the backpack first.

amulet.title: Amulet
amulet.desc: Slot into the amulet bar (max 2) for ongoing passive effects. Adding a 3rd discards the oldest. Drag into the recycle bag to reuse.

magic.title: Magic
magic.desc: Two kinds: instant and permanent. Instant magic goes to the graveyard after use; permanent magic enters the Recycle Bag and returns to the backpack after a few waterfalls, reusable.

event.title: Event
event.desc: Click to reveal options. Could be a shop, chest, altar, shrine, etc. — pick one to gain rewards or take risks.

backpack.title: Backpack & Hand
backpack.desc: Stores non-monster, non-event cards (cap 12–17). Resolving an active card auto-draws one from backpack into hand. Hand cap is 6–8.

combat.flowIntroPre: Monsters on the board never attack first. Combat is
combat.flowHeroFirstB: onto a monster — you strike first; the monster only retaliates if it survives.
combat.flowMonsterFirstB: onto the hero — the monster hits you first, then you take your turn.
combat.heroAttack1Post: , and each equipment slot can only attack once.
combat.heroAttack2: Weapon damage = base value + bonuses (amulets, skills, class, etc.).
combat.heroAttack3Post: . When durability hits 0, the weapon breaks.
combat.heroAttack4Post: : damage doubles on a successful dice roll.
combat.layersBodyA: Monster HP is composed of multiple
combat.layersBodyC: (shown as stacked bars below the number). When attack damage ≥ the current layer's value, that layer breaks; overflow does NOT carry to the next layer. Strip all layers to
combat.block1Pre: When a monster retaliates, you can
combat.block2: A shield absorbs damage (up to its value); overflow goes to your HP. Blocking costs 1 durability.
combat.block3: Special shields (e.g. Iron Tower Shield) fully block all damage; reflect shields bounce half the damage back to the monster.
combat.block4: Dragging a monster onto the hero = take the full damage with no block.
combat.turnBodyPre: After your attack phase ends (out of attacks or you end manually), the
combat.turnBodyPost: begins — every engaged monster attacks you in order. After each, you choose how to block. Once all monsters have attacked, your turn restarts with refreshed attacks. Repeat until monsters die or you fall.
combat.elite1Post: (later half of the deck) have special abilities: Skeletons revive, Ghosts respawn, Ogres crit-chain, etc.
combat.elite2Post: transforms into a Boss after defeat, gaining revival, retaliation damage, death-throes auras, etc.

actions.attackDesc: Drag a weapon onto a monster (or drag a monster onto a slot with a weapon). If damage ≥ layer, kill; otherwise the monster retaliates.
actions.blockDesc: Drag a monster onto a slot with a shield (block then retaliate), or directly onto the hero to take the full hit.
actions.equipDesc: Drag a weapon/shield to a slot. New gear replaces old (old goes to graveyard).
actions.storeDesc: Drag a card to the backpack. Monsters and events can't be stashed. Full backpack means no room.
actions.amuletDesc: Drag an amulet to a slot. Exceeding the cap auto-discards the oldest.
actions.magicDesc: Click a magic card and follow the prompts. Permanent magic returns via the Recycle Bag.
actions.eventDesc: Click an event and pick one option. Some require dice rolls.
actions.discardDesc: Drag a card to the graveyard area (rightmost on row 2) to discard. Discarded cards are gone.
actions.skillDesc: Click the skill button on the hero card (once per waterfall) and pick a target.
actions.diceDesc: Click the D20 (top right). For 50/50 events: ≤10 succeeds, >10 fails.
actions.logDesc: The log panel on the right records all combat, damage, healing, equipment, magic, and event activity. Drag to resize, minimize, or clear. When in doubt, check the log.

tips.tip1Body: the last card on the board is auto-discarded. Try to leave the cards you don't need until the end.
tips.tip2Body: stash potions and good gear, then play from hand when needed. Backpack auto-draws after every action — keep your hand topped up.
tips.tip3Body: after use it goes to the recycle bag and returns to your backpack after a few waterfalls. Cycling these is the key to victory.
tips.tip4Body: weapons and shields wear out. Repair potions and the "Master Repair" magic keep them alive.
tips.tip5Body: killing monsters and events earn gold. Use shops to buy strong cards and extra skills.
tips.tip6Body: the row above always shows what's coming next. Plan equipment swaps and backpack space accordingly.
tips.tip7Body: Heal, Flash, and Power amulets all do different things. Combined with hero skills they multiply your impact.
tips.tip8Bold: Elites appear in the back half:
tips.tip8Body: the front of the deck is mostly basic monsters. Stockpile gear and potions before elites arrive.
tips.uiClickDeck: • Click <0>the deck count</0> to view what's left
tips.uiClickGrave: • Click <0>the graveyard</0> to view discard history
tips.uiClickBackpack: • Click <0>the backpack</0> to view stored cards
tips.uiClickClassDeck: • Click <0>the class deck</0> (bottom-right) to view Knight-only cards
tips.uiHover: • Long-press / hover any card to see full details
tips.uiLogPanel: • <0>📋 Log panel</0> (right): real-time record of combat, damage, healing, equipment, magic, etc. Drag to resize/move; supports minimize and clear
tips.uiCombatPanel: • <0>⚔️ Combat panel</0> (right): pops in during combat, showing the current turn (hero/monster), remaining attacks, slot status, and pending blocks. On hero turn click "End Turn" to hand control to the monster
tips.uiUndo: • <0>↩️ Undo button</0> (bottom-right): undoes recent actions (equip, stash, discard, etc.). Cannot undo during combat or waterfall. The number shows undo depth
